trades.reasoning: The only score-100 candidate with all four confirmation signals — RSI in bullish zone (63.9), MACD crossover, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge — meeting the full multi-signal institutional participation threshold even on a neutral day.

decisions.briefing: Markets closed Q2 on a quiet positive note (NASDAQ +0.7%, S&P +0.3%) — a neutral session, not a risk-on trigger. Cash sits at $577, modestly above the $500 deployment threshold with 4 open slots. AVAV earns a one-position buy because it is the sole score-100 candidate with all four required confirmation signals including a volume surge, making this a genuine signal-driven entry rather than capital deployment for its own sake. All existing positions are held; no neutral-day exits warranted.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly higher on the final trading day of Q2 2026, with the NASDAQ rising 0.7% and the S&P 500 adding 0.3%. Quarter-end portfolio rebalancing and light summer volume kept conviction low in both directions, resulting in a broadly flat session with modest tech leadership. Investors appeared content to book Q2 gains and hold positions rather than make directional bets heading into Q3.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股在2026年第二季度最後一個交易日溫和收漲，那斯達克指數上升0.7%，標普500指數上升0.3%。季末組合再平衡及夏季清淡成交量令市場雙向動力均告不足，整體走勢偏平，科技股小幅領漲。投資者普遍選擇鎖定第二季度盈利，觀望部署，靜候第三季度開局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock trades at 1.5x or more of its 20-day average volume. It signals that large institutional investors — funds, banks, pension managers — are actively participating in the move, not just retail traders. A price rise accompanied by a volume surge carries far more conviction than one on thin volume, because it implies broad, informed buying rather than a random intraday spike.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某股票的成交量達到其20日均量的1.5倍或以上。這通常意味著大型機構投資者——基金、銀行、退休金管理人——正積極參與入市，而非僅靠散戶推動。股價在成交量激增配合下上漲，遠比在清淡成交中上揚更具說服力，因為這代表市場廣泛而知情的買盤，而非隨機的日內短暫波動。
